title: Hikvision IP Camera — Remote Code Execution
description: Hikvision camera detected with firmware vulnerable to CVE-2021-36260 (CVSS 9.8). A command injection vulnerability in the web server allows unauthenticated remote code execution. An attacker can gain full control of the camera, access video feeds, and use the device as a pivot point for lateral movement.

title: Default Credentials on IP Camera
description: The Hikvision camera is accessible with default credentials (admin/12345). Default passwords allow unauthorized access to camera management, video feeds, and configuration changes.
